passage_title: Plant 'thermometer' triggers springtime growth by measuring night-time heat

sentences.sentence: An international team of scientists led by the University of Cambridge has discovered that the 'thermometer' molecule in plants enables them to develop according to seasonal temperature changes.
sentences.translation: 一个由剑桥大学领导的国际科学家团队发现，植物中的“温度计”分子使植物能够根据季节性温度变化发育。

structure.text: An international team of scientists led by the University of Cambridge
led by the University of Cambridge
that the 'thermometer' molecule in plants enables them to develop according to seasonal temperature changes

difficult_points: led by the University of Cambridge 是过去分词短语，后置修饰科学家团队。
has discovered 后接 that 宾语从句，说明发现的具体内容。
them 指代 plants，而不是 scientists。

sentences.sentence: Researchers have revealed that molecules called phytochromes – used by plants to detect light during the day – actually change their function in darkness to become cellular temperature gauges that measure the heat of the night.
sentences.translation: 研究人员揭示，被称为光敏色素的分子——植物白天用来探测光线的分子——实际上会在黑暗中改变功能，成为测量夜间热量的细胞温度计。

structure.text: used by plants to detect light during the day
actually change their function in darkness to become cellular temperature gauges that measure the heat of the night

difficult_points: called phytochromes 是过去分词短语，说明 molecules 的名称。
破折号中的 used by plants... 是插入的后置修饰，解释光敏色素白天的用途。
to become... 表示功能改变后的结果，that measure... 修饰 temperature gauges。

sentences.sentence: The new findings, published in the journal Science, show that phytochromes control genetic switches in response to temperature as well as light to dictate plant development.
sentences.translation: 这些发表在《科学》期刊上的新发现表明，光敏色素会响应温度以及光线来控制基因开关，从而决定植物发育。

structure.text: that phytochromes control genetic switches in response to temperature as well as light

difficult_points: published in the journal Science 是插入修饰，说明研究发表地点。
that 从句是 show 的宾语，承载新发现的内容。
as well as light 表示不仅响应温度，也响应光线。

sentences.sentence: At night, these molecules change states, and the pace at which they change is 'directly proportional to temperature', say scientists, who compare phytochromes to mercury in a thermometer.
sentences.translation: 科学家表示，到了夜间，这些分子会改变状态，而它们改变的速度与温度“成正比”；科学家把光敏色素比作温度计中的水银。

structure.text: and the pace at which they change is 'directly proportional to temperature'
who compare phytochromes to mercury in a thermometer

difficult_points: at which they change 是定语从句，修饰 the pace。
directly proportional to temperature 表示变化速度与温度成正比。
who compare... 是非限制性定语从句，补充说明 scientists 的类比。

sentences.sentence: The warmer it is, the faster the molecular change – stimulating plant growth.
sentences.translation: 温度越高，分子变化就越快——从而刺激植物生长。
difficult_points: The warmer..., the faster... 是“越……越……”的比较结构。
the molecular change 中省略了 is，完整意思是变化越快。
stimulating plant growth 是现在分词短语，说明结果。

expressions.text: The warmer it is, the faster

sentences.sentence: Farmers and gardeners have known for hundreds of years how responsive plants are to temperature: warm winters cause many trees and flowers to bud early, something humans have long used to predict weather and harvest times for the coming year.
sentences.translation: 几个世纪以来，农民和园丁一直知道植物对温度非常敏感：暖冬会使许多树木和花卉提前发芽，而人类长期以来利用这一点预测来年的天气和收获时间。

structure.text: have known for hundreds of years
how responsive plants are to temperature
warm winters cause many trees and flowers to bud early
something humans have long used to predict weather and harvest times for the coming year

difficult_points: have known for hundreds of years 是现在完成时，强调认知长期延续。
how responsive plants are to temperature 是 known 的宾语从句。
冒号后举例解释植物对温度敏感的现象。
something 指代 warm winters cause... 这一整件事。

sentences.sentence: The latest research pinpoints for the first time a molecular mechanism in plants that reacts to temperature – often triggering the buds of spring we long to see at the end of winter.
sentences.translation: 最新研究首次精确指出了植物中一种会对温度作出反应的分子机制，这种机制常常触发我们在冬末渴望看到的春芽。

structure.text: pinpoints for the first time a molecular mechanism in plants
often triggering the buds of spring we long to see at the end of winter
we long to see at the end of winter

difficult_points: for the first time 插入在谓语后，强调首次精确定位。
that reacts to temperature 修饰 molecular mechanism。
triggering... 是现在分词短语，说明该机制带来的结果。
we long to see... 省略关系词，修饰 buds of spring。

sentences.sentence: With weather and temperatures set to become ever more unpredictable due to climate change, researchers say the discovery that this light-sensing molecule also functions as the internal thermometer in plant cells could help us breed tougher crops.
sentences.translation: 由于气候变化使天气和温度将变得越来越难以预测，研究人员表示，这种感光分子也能作为植物细胞内部温度计发挥作用的发现，可能帮助我们培育更耐受的作物。

structure.text: With weather and temperatures set to become ever more unpredictable due to climate change
the discovery that this light-sensing molecule also functions as the internal thermometer in plant cells could help us breed tougher crops
that this light-sensing molecule also functions as the internal thermometer in plant cells
could help us breed tougher crops

difficult_points: With...set to become... 是 with 复合结构，说明背景趋势。
due to climate change 表示天气温度难预测的原因。
discovery 后的 that 从句解释发现的内容。
could help us breed tougher crops 表示该发现的潜在应用。

sentences.sentence: 'It is estimated that agricultural yields will need to double by 2050, but climate change is a major threat to achieving this.
sentences.translation: “据估计，到 2050 年农业产量需要翻倍，但气候变化是实现这一目标的重大威胁。

structure.text: that agricultural yields will need to double by 2050
but climate change is a major threat to achieving this

difficult_points: It is estimated that... 是形式主语结构，真正内容在 that 从句中。
will need to double 表示未来产量需求必须翻倍。
this 指代 agricultural yields will need to double by 2050 这一目标。

sentences.sentence: Key crops such as wheat and rice are sensitive to high temperatures.
sentences.translation: 小麦和水稻等主要作物对高温敏感。

structure.text: Key crops such as wheat and rice

difficult_points: such as wheat and rice 举例说明 key crops。
be sensitive to 表示对某种因素易受影响。
high temperatures 在农业语境中指可能造成热胁迫的高温。

sentences.sentence: Thermal stress reduces crop yields by around 10% for every one degree increase in temperature,' says lead researcher Dr Philip Wigge from Cambridge's Sainsbury Laboratory.
sentences.translation: 剑桥大学塞恩斯伯里实验室的首席研究员菲利普·维格博士说：“温度每升高一度，热胁迫就会使作物产量减少约 10%。”

structure.text: for every one degree increase in temperature
says lead researcher Dr Philip Wigge from Cambridge's Sainsbury Laboratory

difficult_points: reduces...by around 10% 表示减少的幅度。
for every one degree increase in temperature 表示每升温一度对应的影响。
says 后的长主语说明说话者身份和机构。

sentences.sentence: 'Discovering the molecules that allow plants to sense temperature has the potential to accelerate the breeding of crops resilient to thermal stress and climate change.'
sentences.translation: “发现能让植物感知温度的分子，有可能加速培育能够抵御热胁迫和气候变化的作物。”

structure.text: Discovering the molecules that allow plants to sense temperature
that allow plants to sense temperature
has the potential to accelerate the breeding of crops
resilient to thermal stress and climate change

difficult_points: Discovering... 是动名词短语作主语。
that allow plants to sense temperature 修饰 molecules。
has the potential to 表示“有可能做某事”。
resilient to... 后置修饰 crops，说明作物抗逆能力。

sentences.sentence: In their active state, phytochrome molecules bind themselves to DNA to restrict plant growth.
sentences.translation: 在活跃状态下，光敏色素分子会把自己结合到 DNA 上，以限制植物生长。
difficult_points: In their active state 表示分子处于活跃状态时。
bind themselves to DNA 是反身代词结构，强调分子自身附着到 DNA 上。
to restrict plant growth 表示结合 DNA 的结果或目的。

sentences.sentence: During the day, sunlight activates the molecules, slowing down growth.
sentences.translation: 白天，阳光会激活这些分子，从而减缓生长。
difficult_points: During the day 是时间状语，对应后文夜间的不同机制。
slowing down growth 是现在分词短语，说明阳光激活分子后的结果。
the molecules 指代 phytochrome molecules。

sentences.sentence: If a plant finds itself in shade, phytochromes are quickly inactivated – enabling it to grow faster to find sunlight again.
sentences.translation: 如果一株植物发现自己处在阴影中，光敏色素会迅速失活——使它能更快生长以重新找到阳光。

structure.text: If a plant finds itself in shade
enabling it to grow faster to find sunlight again

difficult_points: If 引导条件从句，描述植物处在阴影中的情况。
are quickly inactivated 是被动语态，说明光敏色素被迅速失活。
enabling... 是现在分词短语，说明失活带来的结果。
it 指代 a plant。

sentences.sentence: This is how plants compete to escape each other's shade.
sentences.translation: 这就是植物为摆脱彼此的阴影而竞争的方式。

structure.text: how plants compete to escape each other's shade

difficult_points: This 指代上一句中阴影导致快速生长的机制。
how 从句作表语，说明植物竞争的方式。
to escape... 表示 compete 的目的。

sentences.sentence: 'Light-driven changes to phytochrome activity occur very fast, in less than a second,' says Wigge.
sentences.translation: 维格说：“由光驱动的光敏色素活性变化发生得非常快，不到一秒钟。”
difficult_points: Light-driven 是复合形容词，表示变化由光驱动。
to phytochrome activity 说明变化发生在光敏色素活性上。
in less than a second 表示反应速度极快。

sentences.sentence: At night, however, it's a different story.
sentences.translation: 然而到了夜间，情况就不同了。
difficult_points: however 表示与白天光驱动的快速变化形成对比。
a different story 是习惯表达，表示情况不同。
At night 与前文 During the day 形成时间对照。

sentences.sentence: Instead of a rapid deactivation following sundown, the molecules gradually change from their active to inactive state.
sentences.translation: 这些分子并不是在日落后迅速失活，而是逐渐从活跃状态转变为非活跃状态。

structure.text: Instead of a rapid deactivation following sundown
gradually change from their active to inactive state

difficult_points: Instead of 引出被否定或替代的情况。
following sundown 是现在分词短语，表示日落之后。
from their active to inactive state 表示状态转换的方向。

sentences.sentence: This is called 'dark reversion'.
sentences.translation: 这被称为“暗回复”。
difficult_points: This 指代上一句中的夜间逐渐从活跃状态转为非活跃状态。
is called 是被动结构，用来给现象命名。

sentences.sentence: 'Just as mercury rises in a thermometer, the rate at which phytochromes revert to their inactive state during the night is a direct measure of temperature,' says Wigge.
sentences.translation: 维格说：“正如水银会在温度计中上升一样，光敏色素在夜间回复到非活跃状态的速率，是温度的直接衡量指标。”

structure.text: Just as mercury rises in a thermometer
the rate at which phytochromes revert to their inactive state during the night
at which phytochromes revert to their inactive state during the night
is a direct measure of temperature

difficult_points: Just as 引导类比，把光敏色素回复速率与水银上升相比。
at which 引导定语从句，修饰 the rate。
a direct measure of temperature 表示该速率可以直接反映温度。

sentences.sentence: 'The lower the temperature, the slower the rate at which phytochromes revert to inactivity, so the molecules spend more time in their active, growth-suppressing state.
sentences.translation: “温度越低，光敏色素回复到非活跃状态的速率就越慢，因此这些分子会在活跃的、抑制生长的状态中停留更久。

structure.text: the slower the rate at which phytochromes revert to inactivity
at which phytochromes revert to inactivity
so the molecules spend more time in their active, growth-suppressing state

difficult_points: The lower..., the slower... 是“越……越……”结构。
at which 引导定语从句，修饰 rate。
so 引出结果：分子在活跃状态停留更久。
growth-suppressing 是复合形容词，表示“抑制生长的”。

sentences.sentence: This is why plants are slower to grow in winter.
sentences.translation: 这就是植物在冬季生长较慢的原因。

structure.text: why plants are slower to grow in winter

difficult_points: This 指代上一句低温使光敏色素更久保持抑制生长状态的机制。
why 从句作表语，解释冬季植物生长变慢的原因。
slower to grow 是形容词加不定式结构。

sentences.sentence: Warm temperatures accelerate dark reversion, so that phytochromes rapidly reach an inactive state and detach themselves from the plant's DNA – allowing genes to be expressed and plant growth to resume.'
sentences.translation: 温暖的温度会加速暗回复，使光敏色素迅速达到非活跃状态并从植物 DNA 上脱离——从而让基因得以表达，植物生长得以恢复。”

structure.text: so that phytochromes rapidly reach an inactive state and detach themselves from the plant's DNA
allowing genes to be expressed and plant growth to resume

difficult_points: so that 引导结果从句，说明温度加速暗回复造成的分子状态变化。
detach themselves from... 使用反身代词，强调光敏色素自身脱离 DNA。
allowing... 是现在分词短语，继续说明结果。
to be expressed 是被动不定式，表示基因被表达。

sentences.sentence: Wigge believes phytochrome thermo-sensing evolved at a later stage, and co-opted the biological network already used for light-based growth during the downtime of night.
sentences.translation: 维格认为，光敏色素的温度感知是在较晚阶段演化出来的，并借用了夜间停歇时已经用于基于光照生长的生物网络。

structure.text: phytochrome thermo-sensing evolved at a later stage
already used for light-based growth during the downtime of night

difficult_points: believes 后省略 that，引出宾语从句。
evolved at a later stage 表示温度感知功能较晚才演化出现。
co-opted 表示借用或征用已有网络。
already used... 后置修饰 biological network。

sentences.sentence: Some plants mainly use day length as an indicator of the season.
sentences.translation: 有些植物主要把日照长度作为季节的指标。

structure.text: as an indicator of the season

difficult_points: mainly 表明这些植物更依赖日长而非温度。
as an indicator of the season 表示把日长当作判断季节的信号。

sentences.sentence: Other species, such as daffodils, have considerable temperature sensitivity, and can flower months in advance during a warm winter.
sentences.translation: 其他物种，如水仙花，则具有相当高的温度敏感性，并且可能在暖冬期间提前数月开花。

structure.text: and can flower months in advance during a warm winter

difficult_points: such as daffodils 是插入例子，说明 other species。
considerable temperature sensitivity 表示对温度有很强反应。
months in advance 表示提前数月。

sentences.sentence: In fact, the discovery of the dual role of phytochromes provides the science behind a well-known rhyme long used to predict the coming season: oak before ash we'll have a splash, ash before oak we're in for a soak.
sentences.translation: 事实上，光敏色素双重作用的发现，为一句长期用于预测即将到来的季节的著名押韵谚语提供了科学依据：橡树先于白蜡树发芽会有小雨，白蜡树先于橡树发芽则会大雨淋漓。

structure.text: the discovery of the dual role of phytochromes
provides the science behind a well-known rhyme
long used to predict the coming season
oak before ash we'll have a splash, ash before oak we're in for a soak

difficult_points: dual role 指光敏色素既感光又感温的双重作用。
behind a well-known rhyme 表示为谚语背后的经验提供科学解释。
long used... 是过去分词短语，修饰 rhyme。
冒号后直接给出押韵谚语内容。

sentences.sentence: Wigge explains: 'Oak trees rely much more on temperature, likely using phytochromes as thermometers to dictate development, whereas ash trees rely on measuring day length to determine their seasonal timing.
sentences.translation: 维格解释说：“橡树更加依赖温度，很可能把光敏色素作为温度计来决定发育；而白蜡树依赖测量日照长度来确定其季节性时机。

structure.text: Oak trees rely much more on temperature
likely using phytochromes as thermometers to dictate development
whereas ash trees rely on measuring day length to determine their seasonal timing

difficult_points: rely much more on temperature 表示橡树更依赖温度信号。
likely using... 是现在分词短语，说明橡树可能采用的机制。
whereas 引导对比，从橡树转到白蜡树。
to determine their seasonal timing 表示测量日长的目的。

sentences.sentence: A warmer spring, and consequently a higher likeliness of a hot summer, will result in oak leafing before ash.
sentences.translation: 更温暖的春天，以及随之而来的炎热夏季可能性更高，会导致橡树先于白蜡树长叶。

structure.text: and consequently a higher likeliness of a hot summer
will result in oak leafing before ash

difficult_points: and consequently... 是插入的并列补充，说明暖春意味着炎夏可能性更高。
result in 后接动名词短语 oak leafing before ash。
leafing 在此表示树木长叶。

sentences.sentence: A cold spring will see the opposite.
sentences.translation: 寒冷的春天则会出现相反的情况。
difficult_points: will see 是拟人化表达，意思是“会出现”。
the opposite 指白蜡树先于橡树长叶，与上一句相反。

sentences.sentence: As the British know only too well, a colder summer is likely to be a rain-soaked one.'
sentences.translation: 正如英国人再清楚不过的那样，较冷的夏天很可能是一个多雨的夏天。”

structure.text: As the British know only too well
is likely to be a rain-soaked one

difficult_points: As 引导方式/评论从句，表示英国人对此非常熟悉。
only too well 表示“非常清楚”，带有强调。
one 指代 summer，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: The new findings are the culmination of twelve years of research involving scientists from Germany, Argentina and the US, as well as the Cambridge team.
sentences.translation: 这些新发现是十二年研究的结晶，研究参与者包括来自德国、阿根廷和美国的科学家，以及剑桥团队。

structure.text: are the culmination of twelve years of research
involving scientists from Germany, Argentina and the US
as well as the Cambridge team

difficult_points: the culmination of 表示长期研究最终形成的成果。
involving... 是现在分词短语，说明 research 涉及的人员。
as well as 添加 Cambridge team，表示不仅有多国科学家。

sentences.sentence: The work was done in a model system, using a mustard plant called Arabidopsis, but Wigge says the phytochrome genes necessary for temperature sensing are found in crop plants as well.
sentences.translation: 这项工作是在一个模型系统中完成的，使用的是一种名为拟南芥的芥菜植物；但维格说，温度感知所需的光敏色素基因也存在于农作物中。

structure.text: The work was done in a model system
using a mustard plant called Arabidopsis
the phytochrome genes necessary for temperature sensing are found in crop plants as well

difficult_points: was done 是被动语态，说明研究工作完成的系统。
using... 是现在分词短语，补充模型系统使用的植物。
necessary for temperature sensing 后置修饰 phytochrome genes。
as well 表示这些基因也存在于作物中。

sentences.sentence: 'Recent advances in plant genetics now mean that scientists are able to rapidly identify the genes controlling these processes in crop plants, and even alter their activity using precise molecular “scalpels”,' adds Wigge.
sentences.translation: 维格补充说：“植物遗传学的最新进展如今意味着，科学家能够快速识别控制作物中这些过程的基因，甚至可以使用精确的分子‘手术刀’改变它们的活性。”

structure.text: that scientists are able to rapidly identify the genes controlling these processes in crop plants
controlling these processes in crop plants
and even alter their activity using precise molecular “scalpels”

difficult_points: Recent advances... 作主语，mean 后接 that 从句说明这些进展带来的能力。
are able to rapidly identify 表示科学家现在能够快速识别。
controlling... 后置修饰 genes。
using precise molecular “scalpels” 表示改变基因活性的手段。

expressions.meaning_zh: 植物遗传学的最新进展

sentences.sentence: 'Cambridge is uniquely well-positioned to do this kind of research as we have outstanding collaborators nearby who work on more applied aspects of plant biology, and can help us transfer this new knowledge into the field.'
sentences.translation: “剑桥在开展这类研究方面具有独特优势，因为我们附近有出色的合作者，他们研究植物生物学中更偏应用的方面，并能帮助我们把这些新知识转化到田间实践中。”

structure.text: is uniquely well-positioned to do this kind of research
as we have outstanding collaborators nearby
who work on more applied aspects of plant biology
and can help us transfer this new knowledge into the field

difficult_points: well-positioned to do 表示具备做某事的有利条件。
as 引导原因从句，解释剑桥为何有独特优势。
who work on... 是定语从句，修饰 collaborators。
transfer this new knowledge into the field 表示把研究知识应用到田间或实际农业中。

expressions.text: transfer this new knowledge into the field
expressions.meaning_zh: 把新知识转化到田间实践中
